hero.description: An invitation-only estate nestled above a private coastline — where 48 curated suites and 16 motorcycles await those who seek perfection without compromise.

about.title: A Sanctuary Built for the Discerning Few
about.body1: Born from the belief that true luxury is not decoration but sensation — Ankor Book was conceived on 18 acres of volcanic coastline as a sanctuary for those who have experienced everything, yet seek something more profound.
about.body2: Our fleet of 16 hand-selected motorcycles offers a dimension of freedom rarely associated with five-star hospitality. Here, the journey is as curated as the destination.

0.name: Private Shoreline
0.desc: 1.2km of exclusive white sand, reserved for guests only.

1.name: 3-Star Cuisine
1.desc: Chef Théodore Blanc's nightly tasting menu.

2.name: Moto Fleet
2.desc: 16 premium bikes, guided routes, full gear.

3.name: Onsen Sanctuary
3.desc: Volcanic stone villas with private thermal pools.

suites.desc: Each suite is a private sanctuary, conceived by Pritzker-winning architects using materials sourced within 100 miles.

fleet.desc: 16 machines of pure adrenaline, maintained to competition standards. Prepared for your command.

booking.title: Secure a Sanctuary
booking.desc: Select your stay dates, preferred villa, or motorcycle. Combined packages receive a 15% rate reduction.
booking.fullNameLabel: Full Legal Name (as on ID / Passport)
booking.uploadKhmerId: Upload National ID Card Photo (Front & Back)
booking.clickUploadId: Click to upload Khmer National ID photo
booking.clickUploadPassport: Click to upload Passport info page photo
booking.licenseNumberLabel: Driver's License Number (Class A / International Driving Permit)
booking.clickUploadLicense: Click to upload Driver's License photo
booking.securityDepositNotice: Refundable Security Deposit of $200–$500 pre-authorized at vehicle handover.
booking.scanInstructions: Open your mobile banking app, scan this KHQR code, and authorize payment. The transaction will auto-verify securely.
booking.hotelInstDesc: Your stay will be reserved under your verified profile. No online payment is required today. The invoice will be settled at the hotel check-in desk.
booking.successDesc: Your booking is confirmed. A receipt and digital key guide have been dispatched to your email address.

top.desc: A sanctuary where silence is the ultimate luxury and the open road is always just outside your door. 48 suites, 16 motorcycles, one extraordinary world.

footer.copy: © 2026 Ankor Book Estates & Motorworks. All rights reserved.

routes.title:
Six Legendary
Roads
routes.desc1: Each of our six curated routes was personally mapped by our head of moto experiences, Luca Ferretti. Every road is assessed weekly for safety, scenery, and discovery.
routes.desc2: GPS-loaded route cards are prepared for each rental. Every route includes rest stops, fuel points, emergency contacts, and hidden viewpoints unknown to public maps.

chat.title: Ankor Book Concierge
chat.greeting: Welcome to Ankor Book Estates & Motorworks 🏛️✨ I am Isabelle, your Private Concierge. How may I assist with your stay, villa selection, or motorcycle fleet today?
chat.placeholder: Ask Concierge about stay, bikes, transfers...
chat.name: Isabelle Moreau · Chief Concierge

responses.default: Thank you for contacting Ankor Book Concierge! Our team is dedicated to providing an extraordinary sanctuary experience. How else may I assist your itinerary today?
responses.suites: Our resort features 6 handcrafted luxury sanctuaries ranging from our Obsidian Garden Suite to the 400m² Imperial Residence. Would you like me to direct you to our live reservation widget?
responses.moto: Our stable features 16 competition-grade motorcycles including Ducati Scrambler 800 and Harley-Davidson Pan America. For motor rentals, guests present a valid Driver’s License and Khmer ID or Passport. Complimentary helmets are sized at check-in.
responses.transfer: We provide bespoke arrivals via Rolls-Royce Phantom chauffeur, private yacht from ocean ports, or direct landing at our Private Helipad. Our concierge team manages all flight and marine logistics.
responses.dining: Executive Chef Jean-Luc Vasquez curates Michelin-starred Khmer-French gastronomy at L’Ankor Dining Room. Complimentary table allocations are reserved for all stay guests.
responses.scrollBooking: Sailing to our secure reservation widget now! You can configure your stay dates, villa choice, or motorcycle package right away.
responses.scrollFleet: Scrolling to our Motorcycle Fleet stable!
responses.scrollSuites: Escorting you to our Curated Sanctuaries gallery!
